records.category: Addendum, Material quoted from Ibn al-Ghaḍā’irī by other authors (al-Najāshī, ʿAllāma Ḥillī and Ibn Dāwud) but not found within the Kitāb al-Ḍuʿafa.
records.chapter: Muḥammad b. Aḥmad b. Quḍāʿa b. Ṣafwān b. Mihrān, Abū ʿAbdillāh, al-Ṣafwāni
records.author: Abū al-Ḥusayn Aḥmad b. al-Ḥusayn al-Ghaḍā'irī
records.englishText: 66 – Muḥammad b. Aḥmad b. Quḍāʿa b. Ṣafwān b. Mihrān, Abū ʿAbdillāh, al-Ṣafwāni.  I have not disclaimed anything from him except for what he narrates from his father from his grandfather from al-Sadiq  عليه السلام , for it is something unknown and I have seen unrecognized (matters) in it, untrue against/upon him.  And I suspect that the lying was by his father.
records.arabicText: 66 - محمد بن أحمد بن قضاعة بن صفوان بن مهران، أبو عبد الله، الصفواني. ما أنكرت منه شيئا إلا ما يرويه [عن أبيه] عن جده، عن الصادق (عليه السلام)، فإنه شيء غير معروف، وقد رأيت فيه مناكير مكذوبة عليه. وأظن الكذب من قبل أبيه.
